subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses in truth and made them a guidance and remembrance unto all the worlds, and through them hath enabled His servants to know Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق و جعلها هدی و ذکری للعالمین و بها عرف العباد نفسه
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
